result:
**Phase 2 complete.** 

The fix in `TypingText.swift:28-30`:
- Added `.frame(maxWidth: .infinity, alignment: .leading)` — pins the visible text to the leading edge so it doesn't shift as characters are added
- Added `.animation(nil, value: displayedCount)` — prevents SwiftUI from applying implicit animations to the text frame changes between character ticks

Build verified successfully.
